title: justicia contorta
intro: Justicia contorta, also known as the twisted jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Justicia contorta include its potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Justicia contorta typically involve drying the flowers and leaves to create teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
